creator: ganthore@gmail.com
text:
Note that I have PKGNG enabled in /etc/make.conf...

I upgraded from FreeBSD-10.0-BETA2 to BETA3. The upgrade was successful, however, portmaster suddenly reported having problems with registered packages in /var/db/pkg. Complete portmaster log is as follows:

portmaster -a -y -H

How-To-Repeat: 1) Install a lot of packages on FreeBSD-10.0-BETA2 with portmaster while having PKGNG enabled. I just have the complete X11 packages along with fluxbox and some apps from lxde.

2) Upgrade to FreeBSD-10.0-BETA3 via binary update.

3) After system reboot, attempt to run portmaster -a -y
